ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach of the team */,
  "general_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the general manager of the team */,
  "assistant_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assistant coach of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Colors of the team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the coach */,
  "career_wins" INTEGER /* Number of career wins of the coach */,
  "career_losses" INTEGER /* Number of career losses of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the ice */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently on */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "left_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team (if applicable) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the referee */,
  "licensed_date" TEXT /* Date the referee was licensed */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the referee */,
  "games_officiated" INTEGER /* Number of games officiated by the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the performance is recorded */,
  "exp_pts" REAL /* Expected points for the team */,
  "exp_gf" REAL /* Expected goals for the team */,
  "exp_ga" REAL /* Expected goals against the team */,
  "diff" REAL /* Goal difference (Exp GF - Exp GA) */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Goal ratio (Exp GF / Exp GA) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Actual points earned by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "ot_losses" INTEGER /* Number of overtime losses by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties taken by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways by the player */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team manager, league official, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource being accessed (e.g., team performance, player statistics) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the division belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "general-managers" (
  "general_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each general manager */,
  "general_manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the general manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the general manager */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the general manager was hired */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the general manager manages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("general_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assistant-coaches" (
  "assistant_coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assistant coach */,
  "assistant_coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the assistant coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the assistant coach */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the assistant coach was hired */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the assistant coach is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assistant_coach_id")
)
